# Organic Law on Data Protection and Guarantee of Digital Rights

Jurisdiction: Spain
Region: ES
Citation: Ley Orgánica 3/2018
Authority: BOE / AEPD
Source URL: https://www.boe.es/buscar/act.php?id=BOE-A-2018-16673
Topics: lawful_basis, data_subject_rights, children_data, employee_data, digital_rights, accountability
Keywords: LOPDGDD, AEPD, digital rights, Spain data protection

## Summary
Spain's GDPR adaptation law with national processing bases, digital rights, employee privacy, whistleblowing, and AEPD enforcement provisions.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply Spanish digital-rights and employee-monitoring rules.
- Check Spanish age and consent rules for minors.
- Use AEPD criteria for national enforcement risk.
